name: Keisuke Hirose
description:
Keisuke was Shouya Ishida's friend in elementary school. Although he did bully Shouko Nishimiya, he wasn't a huge participant and usually seemed uncomfortable picking on her. However, he was more than happy bullying Shouya later on.

~!Keisuke stayed close with Kazuki after graduation and along with him brings Shouya from the river after he falls down after saving Shouko.!~
